summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Chile by sea, air, or land are normally handled under dangerous-goods transport rules that rely on the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3. BESS exporters should provide UN 38.3 test summaries, SDS, classification, packaging, state-of-charge controls where applicable, and transport documents for cells, modules, battery packs, and spare/replacement units.
summary.zh: 通过海运、空运或陆运运往智利的锂电芯和电池通常按危险货物运输规则处理，并依赖《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3小节。BESS出口商应提供电芯、模组、电池包及备品备件的UN 38.3测试摘要、SDS、分类、包装、适用时的荷电状态控制及运输文件。
summary.zht: 通過海運、空運或陸運運往智利的鋰電芯和電池通常按危險貨物運輸規則處理，並依賴《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3小節。BESS出口商應提供電芯、模組、電池包及備品備件的UN 38.3測試摘要、SDS、分類、包裝、適用時的荷電狀態控制及運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations lithium battery provisions

summary.en: China factory GB reports, cell specifications, and battery safety certificates are not substitutes for dangerous-goods transport evidence. UN 38.3 reports and test summaries should match the actual cells, modules, and battery assemblies shipped from China to Chile.
summary.zh: 中国工厂GB报告、电芯规格书和电池安全证书不能替代危险货物运输证据。UN 38.3报告及测试摘要应与从中国运往智利的实际电芯、模组和电池组件一致。
summary.zht: 中國工廠GB報告、電芯規格書和電池安全證書不能替代危險貨物運輸證據。UN 38.3報告及測試摘要應與從中國運往智利的實際電芯、模組和電池組件一致。

gap.en: Confirm the transported configuration, UN number, packing instruction, tested type, manufacturer identity, rated energy, and whether the project ships cells, modules, racks, containers, or replacement batteries. Re-test or obtain addenda if the shipped configuration is not covered by the existing UN 38.3 file.
gap.zh: 应确认运输构型、UN编号、包装指令、受试型号、制造商身份、额定能量，以及项目运输的是电芯、模组、电池架、集装箱还是替换电池。如出货构型未被现有UN 38.3文件覆盖，应重新测试或取得补充文件。
gap.zht: 應確認運輸構型、UN編號、包裝指令、受試型號、製造商身份、額定能量，以及項目運輸的是電芯、模組、電池架、集裝箱還是替換電池。如出貨構型未被現有UN 38.3文件覆蓋，應重新測試或取得補充文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for dangerous-goods transport where lithium battery transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where lithium battery dangerous-goods rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not a Chile grid or SEC approval. It must match the shipped lithium battery configuration and should travel with the dangerous-goods documentation package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是智利并网或SEC批准。其必须匹配实际出运的锂电池构型，并应随危险货物文件包一并提供。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是智利併網或SEC批准。其必須匹配實際出運的鋰電池構型，並應隨危險貨物文件包一併提供。
